title: Blanket Lifter for Feet, Adjustable Height Blanket Lifters for Foot of Bed, Aluminum Alloy Blanket Lifter for Foot Toes Leg Knee Ankle Post Surgery Recovery, 4 Clips Included
features: Enjoy a Sound Sleep with Pressure Relieve - The DePango blanket lifter relieves pressure on your feet and toes by keeping the weight of bed linens or sheets off them. Say goodbye to discomfort from covers touching your legs and toes, and create a cozy bed tent for your feet to rest comfortably. Ensure a deep and peaceful sleep, perfect for post-surgery casts or arthritis.

Sturdy to Hold Heavyweight Blanket with Ease - The blanket support bar is made of heavy-duty aluminium alloy. The solid coat-painted tube pole surface and robust spring button locking construction with L-shape design provides a reliable and stable support for heavy comforters, eliminating the need for stacked pillows.

Height Adjustable for All Thick Mattress - With an adjustable range from 26 to 33 inches (66-84 cm), you can customize the height of the blanket lift bar to fit your mattress perfectly. Ideal for mattresses thickness ranging from 6 to 18 inches (15-46 cm), the spring button locking mechanism allows for easy adjustments and provides ample space for your feet to rest comfortably.

Stable Fixation without Covers Shifting - Tucked securely between your mattress and box springs on the end/side of your bed, the DePango bed cradle holder bar frame for feet comes with 4 clips to keep your bed sheets in place and prevent covers from shifting during the night. Enjoy undisturbed sleep.

Say Goodbye to Terrible Assembly - Thanks to the simple user manual including instructional video, assembly is a breeze within 2-3 minutes for the DePango blanket lifter. Forget about complicated screw-nut connections, simply press the spring button to secure the lifter in place. Lightweight and portable, this blanket lifter is easy to move and set up wherever you need it.
